author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--fix-sessions-migration
content: Decision: Fix the column name (primary fix) AND make v7 migration robust (defensive fix). The column name fix prevents re-running migrations on every open. The v7 robustness fix ensures that even if the migration does re-run (e.g., from a DB at user_version < 7), it handles the case where sessions has extra columns. Also dropping leftover sessions_new table.
